---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability.
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you are running into. What workflow does this affect?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this to work. Be specific about the user-facing behavior: what commands would the user run, what output would they see, and what would change in the saved workspace file.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you considered and why you think the proposed solution is better.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that help explain the request. If this relates to a specific Claude Code setup (e.g., SDK sessions, multi-editor workflows), describe your environment.
